summary.lv: Senior IT Service Continuity Specialist Luminor bankā — IT noturības un katastrofu atjaunošanas vadība visā organizācijā: ITSCM plāni, risku un biznesa ietekmes analīze, DR testi un ITIL/ISO 22301 prakse atbilstoši regulām kā DORA; nepieciešama augsta līmeņa praktiska pieredze.
summary.en: Senior IT Service Continuity Specialist at Luminor Bank, leading IT resilience and disaster recovery across the organization — ITSCM plans, risk and business-impact analysis, DR tests and ITIL/ISO 22301 practices aligned with regulations such as DORA; senior hands-on experience required.
